---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a bug to help us improve Lumina"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📍 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

What should happen instead of the bug?

## 😞 Actual Behavior

What actually happens instead?

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.1, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser** (if applicable): [e.g. Chrome 121.0, Safari 17.1]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 20.10.0]
- **Python Version** (if working on API): [e.g. 3.11.0]
- **Lumina Version**: [e.g. 0.1.0 or latest]

## 📋 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem?

## 🔍 Possible Cause

If you have any idea what might be causing this, please share it here.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched for similar issues
- [ ] I've checked the latest version
- [ ] I've included steps to reproduce
- [ ] I've included error messages/logs
- [ ] I've included environment information
